Why.title: Why choose PROVIN?
Why.subtitle: An individual, comprehensive approach that goes beyond a standard vehicle history report.
Why.highlightQuote: A data printout is not a decision.
Why.highlightQuoteBody: Automated reports list records; PROVIN compares sources, reviews the listing, and explains what it means for this car and this purchase.
Why.block1Intro: Vehicle history is like a puzzle — no database is perfect, and sources often disagree. Relying on a single report risks missing critical information:

block1List.d: While one report looks “clean,” another may reveal major repairs or odometer tampering.
Only a thorough listing review — photos, description, and details — can surface issues databases may not reflect.
With PROVIN you no longer buy separate reports from different services — we consolidate everything for you.

Why.block2Intro: We combine digital data with hands-on experience so you get the full picture:

puzzleBullets.d: We analyse information from multiple independent sources — AutoDNA, CarVertical, Auto Records* and other databases.
We assess the model’s weak points — engine components, transmission, DPF — so you know what to look for at inspection.
Unique tools surface information that never appears in classic reports: DPF, component reliability, price fairness.
If needed, we contact the seller to clarify details and protect you from misinformation or hidden risks.

Why.autoRecordsFootnote: * May apply only to certain manufacturers
